home.name: Raisa Kouekam
home.subtitle: I design, build and ship production web applications — including live e-commerce marketplace Yorix and fintech platform HODIX — for real users and measurable business impact.

about.label: About Me
about.title: Building Digital Products That Make an Impact
about.subtitle: Passionate about designing and developing scalable digital solutions that solve real-world business problems.
paragraphs: I'm a Full Stack Software Engineer passionate about building modern web applications and digital products that create meaningful value for users and businesses.
I design complete solutions — from intuitive user interfaces to robust backend architecture and thoughtful database management — ensuring every layer works together seamlessly.

My experience includes 5 client projects delivered and 4 currently in progress — including live platforms Yorix Marketplace and HODIX Fintech — turning complex requirements into reliable, user-facing products.
I believe in continuous learning, writing clean code, collaborating effectively with teams and building software designed to deliver long-term value.

yorix.title: Yorix Marketplace
yorix.description: A multi-vendor e-commerce marketplace connecting buyers and sellers with secure payments, real-time inventory and a streamlined shopping experience.
features: Secure checkout with Stripe payment integration
Advanced product search, filters and categories
Order tracking and automated email notifications

caseStudy.metaDescription: Case study: Yorix Marketplace — multi-vendor e-commerce platform built with Next.js, Stripe and PostgreSQL for the Cameroon market.
caseStudy.overview: Yorix Marketplace is a production multi-vendor e-commerce platform I built end-to-end for Yorix Digital Group, connecting buyers and sellers across Cameroon with secure payments, vendor tools and real-time inventory management.
caseStudy.role: Founder & Lead Developer — product strategy, UX/UI design, full stack development, database architecture, Stripe integration, deployment and ongoing maintenance.
caseStudy.challenge: Build a scalable marketplace where multiple vendors can manage catalogs, inventory and orders independently, while giving buyers a unified, trustworthy shopping experience with secure online payments in a market still adapting to e-commerce.
caseStudy.solution: Architected a Next.js application with TypeScript and PostgreSQL, implementing role-based vendor dashboards, Stripe checkout, advanced product search with filters, automated order notifications and a responsive storefront optimized for mobile-first users.
outcomes: Live production platform at yorix.cm serving real vendors and customers
Multi-vendor architecture with independent seller dashboards and catalog management
Stripe payment integration for secure checkout
SEO-optimized storefront with responsive design across devices

hodix.title: HODIX Fintech
hodix.description: Africa's first super-app for digital tontines and verifiable financial identity — transforming informal community savings into a trusted financial reputation for emerging markets and the diaspora.
features: Digital tontines with automated cycles, reminders and member tracking
Trust Score (0–1000) and tiered identity levels — Bronze to Platinum
Verifiable Financial Identity certificates with QR, hash and public link
Multi-currency wallet (XAF, EUR, USD) with MTN & Orange Money integration
Admin console for members, KYC validation and tontine management

caseStudy.metaDescription: Case study: HODIX Fintech — digital tontines, Trust Score and mobile money super-app for emerging markets and the diaspora.
caseStudy.overview: HODIX is a fintech super-app I'm building for digital tontines, verifiable financial identity and multi-currency wallets — transforming informal community savings into trusted financial reputation for emerging markets and the diaspora.
caseStudy.role: Full Stack Developer — product design, mobile and web development, Supabase backend, payment integrations (MTN & Orange Money), admin tooling and deployment.
caseStudy.challenge: Digitize traditional African tontines (rotating savings groups) while building verifiable financial identity, trust scoring and mobile money payments in markets with low formal banking penetration.
caseStudy.solution: Built with React Native, Expo and Supabase, implementing automated tontine cycles, a 0–1000 Trust Score with tiered identity levels, VFI certificates with QR verification, multi-currency wallets and an admin console for KYC and member management.
outcomes: Live platform at hodix.app with digital tontine management
Trust Score system with Bronze to Platinum identity tiers
Verifiable Financial Identity certificates with public verification
MTN & Orange Money integration for XAF, EUR and USD wallets

digitalGroup.title: Yorix Digital
digitalGroup.description: An internal offline business management software built for Yorix operations — handling workflows, data and day-to-day processes in a secure, self-contained environment.
features: Internal offline-first architecture for reliable field use
Business workflow and operational data management
Secure access for authorized team members only
Deployed on Vercel for controlled internal access
